user.title: Connect to Lymow
user.description: Choose a sign-in method and region. Auto-detect is available for email and password; Google Account requires an explicit region.

password.title: Sign in with email and password

google.title: Sign in with Google
google.description: Copy the Google sign-in URL below. Open a new browser tab, paste the URL into its address bar, and press Enter. Do not open the URL from this Home Assistant page because it may redirect to the dashboard. After signing in, your browser may be unable to open the `myapp://callback` address. Copy that complete callback address and paste it into the authorization field below. If you paste only the authorization code, also paste the state value from the callback. Submit promptly because authorization codes expire quickly.

data_description.oauth_start_url: Read-only. Copy this complete URL and paste it into a new browser tab.
data_description.oauth_state: Required only when pasting an authorization code instead of the complete callback URL.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Lymow authentication services
error.region_required: Select the region for Google sign-in
error.oauth_code_missing: The OAuth callback did not contain an authorization code
error.oauth_state_mismatch: The OAuth state did not match this sign-in attempt
error.invalid_oauth_code: The Google authorization code is invalid or expired
error.missing_refresh_token: Google sign-in did not return a refresh token; start sign-in again

abort.no_devices: No Lymow mower devices were found for this account
abort.reauth_entry_missing: The config entry to reauthenticate no longer exists
abort.region_required: The existing Google entry does not have a valid region

data_description.ble_address: MAC of the robot's Bluetooth radio, used for local manual drive. Leave blank to auto-discover by name.
data_description.rtsp_path: LAN camera stream path. Leave blank for the default 640x480 stream (h264ESVideoTest); set a higher-resolution path here once known.
data_description.rtsp_port: TCP port of the robot's on-board RTSP server (default 10022).
